title: Planning Default Core Install
goal: Implement #463 by shrinking new planning installs to the core daily-operation surfaces identified by the payload classification.
non_goals: Do not delete useful optional planning features entirely.
Do not expand root workspace surfaces to compensate for planning shrinkage.
Do not make existing installs lose locally modified files without conservative migration or adopt behavior.

intent.outcome: New planning installs contain only the core daily-operation planning payload while optional surfaces remain discoverable through explicit package/config paths.
intent.constraints: Use packages/planning/payload-surface-classification.json as the decision source; keep weak-agent compatibility and existing-install safety.
intent.latitude: Choose the smallest installer/package-data changes that make default install cheaper without breaking package tests.
intent.escalation: Escalate if a surface classified as non-core still appears required by ordinary start, summary, proof, or archive behavior.

execution.next_step: Compare REQUIRED_PAYLOAD_FILES and packaging force-includes against smallest_safe_default_install.
execution.proof: planning package tests, ruff, workspace proof selector, and planning doctor

invariants: Optional surfaces remain reachable without becoming first-contact burden.
Existing installs remain conservative around local changes.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #461: make Agentic Planning smaller by default and clearer by boundary.

required_continuation.required follow-on detail: #464-#466 still need optionalization/extraction and capability-map follow-through after the default install shrinks.
required_continuation.activation trigger: after #463 closeout, promote #464 or the next #461 child indicated by validation

parent_lane.title: Reclassify planning payload into core, optional extensions, and extraction candidates

iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: review/intake extraction, generated-mirror separation, and capability-map refresh
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: #464 or #465 depending on which optional surfaces still ship by default

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Shrink default planning install to core daily-operation surfaces.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Preserve conservative migration/adopt behavior and package-agnostic discoverability.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact split between default payload, optional package resources, and package-local maintainer files.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: Shrinking a surface breaks ordinary start, summary, proof, or archive flows.

context_budget.live working set: state, this execplan, #461/#463, packages/planning/payload-surface-classification.json, installer payload constants, packaging config, and package tests
context_budget.recoverable later: #462 archived classification closeout and optional/extraction follow-up issues
context_budget.externalize before shift: record the default payload set and any migration behavior in execution_summary
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Next active issue is #463 planning default core install.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Before removing force-includes or changing upgrade/uninstall behavior.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Make the package streamlined, lightweight, frictionless, cheap, modular, and small while preserving leverage.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Reduce visible and installed residue; preserve leverage by moving non-core surfaces behind explicit selection.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Does a new planning install feel meaningfully smaller without losing daily execution continuity?

active_milestone.scope: Keep this execution thread bounded to default planning payload shrink and conservative migration support.

immediate_next_action: Compare REQUIRED_PAYLOAD_FILES and wheel force-includes against payload-surface-classification.json.
Change the default install to copy only core daily-operation surfaces.
Keep optional surfaces available through an explicit non-default path or package resource.
invariants: Preserve the planning contract and keep the work bounded to this plan.
Use classification evidence rather than ad hoc deletion.
validation_commands: cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_packaging.py tests/test_installer.py -q
cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: New planning installs contain only core daily-operation surfaces.
Package tests assert the smaller default payload.
Existing installs get conservative migration/adopt/upgrade behavior.
Agents can still discover optional extensions when needed.

closure_check.evidence carried forward: #463 owns the first payload shrink after #462 classification.
closure_check.reopen trigger: default planning install still ships non-core surfaces without opt-in selection

drift_log: 2026-04-27: Promoted after #462 classified the planning payload.
